data.body:
💎Total Assault Celebration Supplies💎
Your first Total Assault! How'd you do, Sensei?
A supply drop was sent to cheer you on!

600 Pyroxenes from the supply drop can be viewed in your in-game mailbox!
(Available until 11/26/2021 14:59 PM (UTC))

#BlueArchive
